title: Aranet Temperature Gradient Across Adjacent Zones
app: Custom HEC or scripted input from Aranet Cloud API / Aranet PRO base station
spl:
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-4h
| eval temp=tonumber(coalesce(temp_c, ""))
| eval zone=coalesce(location, zone, "")
| stats latest(temp) as temp_c by zone
| eventstats range(temp_c) as building_span
| where building_span>5
description: Large intra-floor gradients reveal blocked vents, failed VAVs, or hot spots over racks.
value: Protects IT loads and improves comfort uniformity.
implementation: (1) Normalize zone naming. (2) Threshold °C span. (3) Visual floor plan overlay.
grandmaExplanation: We compare temperatures across neighboring zones to find hot and cold spots.
